about.heading: About Joon Hair
body: Welcome to Joon Hair, a beautiful salon in the heart of historic downtown Santa Rosa. Our name “Joon”, is a Persian term of endearment meaning “soul” and “beloved” — a reflection of the warmth and care we bring to each of our guests.

Owned by a wife-wife duo with Persian Ancestry, Joon was created to be a luxury salon with an open and welcoming spirit. Our team includes some of Sonoma county’s most talented stylists, all highly skilled and dedicated to their craft. From precision cuts to custom color and transformative treatments, we’re here to celebrate your unique beauty.

services.title: Cuts & styling
services.description: Precision cuts and styling tailored to your hair and your routine, by stylists who actually listen.

services.title: Color & highlights
services.description: Custom color, balayage, and dimensional highlights — from a subtle refresh to a full transformation.

services.title: Treatments
services.description: Conditioning and bond-repair treatments that bring over-processed or damaged hair back to life.

services.title: Special occasions
services.description: Bridal, business, and birthday styling to get you camera-ready for the moment that matters.

items.a: You'll find us at 205 5th ST Santa Rosa, CA 95401 United States.
Hours can vary — give us a call at (707) 575-1474 and we'll let you know when we're open.
We proudly serve Santa Rosa, CA and the surrounding community.

items.q: How do I get in touch?
items.a: Call us at (707) 575-1474 — we're glad to help.
